result.stdout:
varsub
  Variable Substitution Tool v1.0.0.0

Usage:
  varsub [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file>                                                      Path to the UTF-8 encoded JSON file
  -p, --parameter-path <parameter-path>                                  JSON path of the parameter in the file.
  -v, --value <value>                                                    The new value to replace with the existing value.
  -l, --log-level <Critical|Debug|Error|Information|None|Trace|Warning>  Logging level. [default: Information]
  --version                                                              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                                         Show help and usage information
